parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "api_key": "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",
  "query": "{{ $json.pe_firm_name }} private equity operating team value creation portfolio operations in-house dedicated team capstone",
  "search_depth": "basic",
  "include_answer": true,
  "max_results": 6
}

parameters.text:
=You are a strict PE firm classification engine.
Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown, no explanation, no preamble.

=== CLASSIFICATION TYPES ===

CENTRALIZED (operator-led)
Real examples: KKR Capstone, Bain Capital Portfolio Group, Advent International
Key signals:
- Dedicated in-house operating team page with named members and headcount
- Titles: "Operating Partner", "VP Value Creation", "Director Portfolio Operations", "Capstone Associate"
- Language: "our team of X operating professionals", "full-time dedicated", "embedded in portfolio companies"
- LinkedIn: 50+ profiles with ops career ladder at this firm
- Annual reports mention named ops team with size

HYBRID
Real examples: Carlyle (GPS team), TPG, Warburg Pincus, General Atlantic, CVC Capital
Key signals:
- BOTH in-house ops team AND external advisor network present
- Has a branded internal group AND references external advisors
- Language mixes "our team" with "network of advisors" or "executive partners"
- Smaller internal team (5–20) supplemented by external network

NETWORK-BASED (partner-led)
Real examples: EQT (EQT advisors), Partners Group, Permira advisors, Francisco Partners
Key signals:
- Primarily relies on EXTERNAL advisor/executive network — NOT in-house employees
- Titles: "Operating Executive", "Industrial Advisor", "Venture Partner", "Executive in Residence"
- Language: "network of X advisors", "our advisor network", "external operating partners"
- Fewer than 5 internal ops LinkedIn results
- No dedicated internal ops team page with named headcount

DECENTRALIZED
Real examples: Apollo Global, Affinity Equity Partners, Navis Capital, Granite Asia, PAG
Key signals:
- NO visible operating team anywhere — not on website, not on LinkedIn, not in search results
- Portfolio companies are fully self-managed
- PE firm provides capital + board seats only — no operational support mentioned
- No ops team page, no ops titles, no advisor network found in ANY search

ASSET_MANAGEMENT
Key signals: primarily manages assets/funds — real estate, infrastructure debt, credit strategies
Flag for separate Real Assets agent.

UNCLEAR — ABSOLUTE LAST RESORT
Only use if ALL THREE searches return zero signals and website text has nothing.
If even 1 weak signal exists → classify with low confidence instead.

=== STEP BY STEP DECISION ===
Step 1: Check Search 1 + website — is there ANY in-house ops team mentioned? → leaning CENTRALIZED
Step 2: Check Search 2 — is there also an external advisor network? → upgrade to HYBRID
Step 3: Search 2 shows ONLY external advisors, Search 1 shows nothing internal? → NETWORK-BASED
Step 4: All 3 searches + website = zero ops signals → DECENTRALIZED (they just don't publish it)
Step 5: Primarily asset/fund management language? → ASSET_MANAGEMENT
Step 6: Genuinely nothing at all in any data source → UNCLEAR (last resort)

⚠️ KEY RULE: If no ops team found but firm is clearly a PE firm doing deals → default to DECENTRALIZED, not UNCLEAR.
UNCLEAR should only appear when you cannot even confirm the firm IS a PE firm.

=== CONFIDENCE ===
70–100: clear signals found
50–69: partial signals, pick best match
Below 50: UNCLEAR acceptable BUT only if firm type itself is uncertain

=== TARGETING PATHS ===
Centralized:       ["Path A","Path D"]
Hybrid:            ["Path A","Path B","Path D"]
Network-based:     ["Path B","Path C","Path D"]
Decentralized:     ["Path B","Path D"]
Asset_Management:  ["Refer to Real Assets Agent"]
Unclear:           ["Manual Review — insufficient data"]

=== RETURN THIS EXACT JSON ===
{
  "classification":            "",
  "classification_confidence": 0,
  "classification_evidence":   "",
  "check1_team_page":          "",
  "check2_language":           "",
  "check3_linkedin":           "",
  "check5_annual_report":      "",
  "check6_board_composition":  "",
  "check7_umbrex":             "",
  "operating_team_name":       null,
  "targeting_paths":           [],
  "flag_for_manual_review":    false
}

=== INPUT DATA ===
FIRM: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.pe_firm_name }}
COUNTRY: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.company_country }}
INDUSTRY: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.industry }}
KEYWORDS: {{ ($('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.keywords || '').slice(0,400) }}
APAC OFFICES: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.apac_offices_detected }}
SECTORS: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.sectors_detected }}
TEAM PAGE URL: {{ $('Parse Website').first().json.team_page_url || $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.team_page_url || 'not found' }}
PORTFOLIO PAGE URL: {{ $('Parse Website').first().json.portfolio_page_url || $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.portfolio_page_url || 'not found' }}
TEAM PAGE URL: {{ $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.team_page_url || 'not found' }}
WEBSITE TEXT: {{ ($('Parse Website').first().json.text_sample_for_ai || $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.text_sample_for_ai || 'not available').slice(0,2000) }}
SCRAPE QUALITY: {{ $('Parse Website').first().json.scrape_quality || 'unknown' }}
CENTRALIZED PHRASES FOUND: {{ $('Parse Website').first().json.centralized_phrases || $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.centralized_phrases || 'none' }}
NETWORK PHRASES FOUND: {{ $('Parse Website').first().json.network_phrases || $('Loop Over Qualified Firms1').first().json.network_phrases || 'none' }}

--- SEARCH 1 — OPERATING MODEL ---
Answer: {{ $if($('Search 1 — Operating Model1').isExecuted, $('Search 1 — Operating Model1').first().json.answer || 'no answer', 'not executed') }}
Snippets: {{ $if($('Search 1 — Operating Model1').isExecuted, ($('Search 1 — Operating Model1').first().json.results || []).map(r => r.title + ': ' + r.content).join(' | ').slice(0,1200), '') }}

--- SEARCH 2 — ADVISOR NETWORK ---
Snippets: {{ $if($('Search 2 — Advisor Network1').isExecuted, ($('Search 2 — Advisor Network1').first().json.results || []).map(r => r.title + ': ' + r.content).join(' | ').slice(0,800), '') }}

--- SEARCH 3 — LINKEDIN OPS TITLES ---
Snippets: {{ $if($('Search 3 — LinkedIn Ops Titles1').isExecuted, ($('Search 3 — LinkedIn Ops Titles1').first().json.results || []).map(r => r.title + ': ' + r.content).join(' | ').slice(0,800), '') }}
